storylets.title: {=floor_silence_with_implication_wind_only_title}Only the wind
storylets.setup: {=floor_silence_with_implication_wind_only_setup}Only the wind tonight. Colder than last week. The pickets stand a little closer to their fires, and no one remarks on it.

storylets.title: {=floor_silence_with_implication_bird_at_dawn_title}A single crow
storylets.setup: {=floor_silence_with_implication_bird_at_dawn_setup}A single crow calls at dawn. No reply. The camp stirs slow, and the cook taps the pot twice as if testing whether the morning will answer.

storylets.title: {=floor_silence_with_implication_campfire_embers_title}Embers, no stories
storylets.setup: {=floor_silence_with_implication_campfire_embers_setup}The campfire is down to embers. No one is telling stories tonight. A corporal turns a coal with the tip of his boot and watches it redden and dim without speaking.
